vocab.meaning: những hạn chế về ngân sách
vocab.example: Due to my current budgetary constraints, I tend to shy away from high-end labels and stick to more affordable options.

vocab.meaning: việc chi tiêu xa hoa/phung phí
vocab.example: I personally view buying designer sneakers as an extravagant expenditure that doesn't align with my financial goals.

vocab.meaning: chất lượng quan trọng hơn số lượng
vocab.example: When it comes to footwear, I firmly believe in quality over quantity, so I’d rather save up for one solid pair of boots.

vocab.meaning: một phần nhỏ của chi phí
vocab.example: I often look for discounted items that offer the same durability as luxury brands but at a fraction of the cost.

vocab.meaning: có hiệu quả về chi phí (đáng đồng tiền)
vocab.example: Investing in versatile shoes that can be worn for both work and casual outings is a very cost-effective strategy.

vocab.meaning: việc mua sắm bốc đồng (không tính toán trước)
vocab.example: I try to avoid making an impulse buy when I see a flashy pair of shoes in the window; I prefer to sleep on it first.

vocab.meaning: thu nhập còn lại sau khi trừ các chi phí thiết yếu
vocab.example: I only allocate a small portion of my disposable income to fashion, as I prefer spending on experiences like travel.

vocab.meaning: mức giá không thể bào chữa/hợp lý hóa được
vocab.example: Some athletic shoes carry an unjustifiable price tag simply because they are endorsed by a famous celebrity.
I’m willing to pay a premium for footwear crafted from durable materials like genuine leather or reinforced canvas.

vocab.meaning: đáng giá đồng tiền bát gạo
vocab.example: I generally opt for mid-range brands that strike a perfect balance between style and value for money.
